title: representation
text: representation The right-hand side of a ValRep list item, which defines the format used to display the value in a field. Related Links associative list A list in which each list item consists of a pair of associated values representing a key and value, or a value and its representation. In Uniface, list items are separated by a Gold separator, such as Gold-semicolon (;). For example, "CA=Canada;DE=Germany;US=United States". ValRep An associative list of values and their associated representations. ValRep list A Uniface list for a field, representing the possible values and their representations. Was this topic helpful?
